name: io.github.xieyuschen/gopls-mcp
description: Semantic code analysis for Go using gopls - language-aware navigation, definitions, references
author: xieyuschen

go_definition.description: Jump to definition of Go symbols using semantic location

go_implementation.description: Find interface implementations or types implementing interfaces

go_symbol_references.description: Find all usages/references of a symbol across the codebase

go_get_call_hierarchy.description: Trace call relationships - find callers and callees of functions

go_get_dependency_graph.description: Analyze dependencies between packages and modules

go_dryrun_rename_symbol.description: Preview a symbol rename operation across all files (DRY RUN - no changes are applied). Use go_symbol_references first to assess impact, then use this to preview the exact changes that would be made.

go_list_tools.description: List all available gopls-mcp tools with documentation and parameter schemas.
